zh.Leybourne, Malling, Kent, England: 英國英格蘭肯特萊波恩
zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger de Leybourne Lord Warden of the Cinque Ports於大約1215年出生在英國英格蘭肯特萊波恩時，他的父親Roger de Leybourne Lord of Berwick11213歲，母親Eleanor Turnham24歲。他於從1264年4月25日到1267年9月8日與Eleanor de Ferrers在英國肯特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於從1271年7月到1271年11月5日在英國肯特艾爾哈姆。

zh-hans.Leybourne, Malling, Kent, England: 英国英格兰肯特萊波恩
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger de Leybourne Lord Warden of the Cinque Ports于大约1215年出生在英国英格兰肯特萊波恩时，他的父亲Roger de Leybourne Lord of Berwick11213岁，母亲Eleanor Turnham24岁。他于从1264年4月25日到1267年9月8日与Eleanor de Ferrers在英国肯特结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于从1271年7月到1271年11月5日在英国肯特艾爾哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Leybourne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Laybourne
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from Leyburn in Yorkshire. The placename probably derives from Old English hlēg ‘shelter’ + burna ‘spring, stream’.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger de Leybourne Lord Warden of the Cinque Ports was born about 1215, in Leybourne, Kent, England, United Kingdom, his father, Roger de Leybourne Lord of Berwick, was 11213 and his mother, Eleanor Turnham, was 24. He married Eleanor de Ferrers from 25 April 1264 to 8 September 1267, in Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died from July 1271 to 5 November 1271, in Elham, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger de Leybourne Lord Warden of the Cinque Ports est né environ 1215, à Leybourne, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Roger de Leybourne Lord of Berwick, avait 11213 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Turnham, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor de Ferrers du 25 avril 1264 au 8 septembre 1267, à Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé du juillet 1271 au 5 novembre 1271, à Elham, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger de Leybourne Lord Warden of the Cinque Ports um 1215 in Leybourne, Kent, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger de Leybourne Lord of Berwick 11213 und seine Mutter Eleanor Turnham 24. Er hat von 25. April 1264 bis 8. September 1267 in Kent, England Eleanor de Ferrers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb von Juli 1271 bis 5. November 1271 in Elham, Kent, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de Leybourne Lord Warden of the Cinque Ports è nato il circa 1215 nel Leybourne, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Roger de Leybourne Lord of Berwick, aveva 11213 anni e il suo madre, Eleanor Turnham, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor de Ferrers da 25 aprile 1264 a 8 settembre 1267, nel Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì da luglio 1271 a 5 novembre 1271, nel Elham, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger de Leybourne Lord Warden of the Cinque Portsが約1215年にイギリスイギリスケントリーボウルンで生まれた時，父Roger de Leybourne Lord of Berwickは11213歳，母Eleanor Turnhamは24歳であった。から1264年4月25日まで1267年9月8日にイギリスケントでEleanor de Ferrersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼はから1271年7月まで1271年11月5日にイギリスケントエルハムで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger de Leybourne Lord Warden of the Cinque Ports(이)가 대략 1215년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 리보우른에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger de Leybourne Lord of Berwick(은)는 11213세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor Turnham(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1264년 4월 25일부터 1267년 9월 8일까지 영국 켄트에서 Eleanor de Ferrers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1271년 7월 부터 1271년 11월 5일까지 영국 켄트 엘함에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de Leybourne Lord Warden of the Cinque Ports nasceu aproximadamente 1215, em Leybourne, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Roger de Leybourne Lord of Berwick, tinha 11213 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Turnham, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor de Ferrers de 25 de abril de 1264 a 8 de setembro de 1267, em Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu de julho de 1271 a 5 de novembro de 1271, em Elham, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger de Leybourne Lord Warden of the Cinque Ports родился около 1215 г. в местности либурн, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Roger de Leybourne Lord of Berwick было 11213 года, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Turnham, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor de Ferrers с 25 апреля 1264 по 8 сентября 1267 в местности кэнт, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер с июль 1271 по 5 ноября 1271 в местности элхам, кэнт, Англия.
